functions.title: Guide Book #122
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #122§r
§lShulkore§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Shulker, Monster, Aerial, Boss.
•§lSpawns in§r: Shulkore Dungeon
•§lHealth§r: 300
•§lKnockback resistance§r: 0.3

•§lFly speed§r: 0.2
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Stone Shulkore Trophy, Shulker Shell, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lRange attack§r: Shulkore Missile

•§lProjectile hit damage§r: 8
•§lProjectile effect§r: Levitation, Blindness, Slowness, Weakness.
•Can inflict 2 damage to players that comes near it when its lid is open.
•Can slowly regenerate their health when its lid is closed.
